title: tacsonia mixta subsp. normalis
intro: Tacsonia mixta subsp. normalis, also known as Tacsonia mixta, is a species of flowering plant in the family Passifloraceae, native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant effects, derived from its flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The health benefits of Tacsonia mixta subsp. normalis include relief from pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as improved digestion and immune function. Herbal preparations of Tacsonia mixta subsp. normalis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
